phrases.text_local: Você pode me indicar um lugar para provar ginjinha aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG loo-GAHR PUH-ruh proo-VAHR zheen-ZHEE-nyuh uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the pharmacist at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the pharmacist at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where herbal tea is weighed
phrases.text_local: Onde é que se pesa chá de ervas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH SIH PEH-zuh SHAH DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Lateral scales preserve the main counter flow during busy hours while maintaining traditional weighing practices.

likely_response.local: A balança fica na seção de ervas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH buh-LAHNNG-suh FEE-kuh NUH sih-SOWN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where do you weigh herbal tea? The scale is in the herb section.

responses.english: Where do you weigh herbal tea? The scale is in the herb section.
responses.phonetic: AH buh-LAHNNG-suh FEE-kuh NUH sih-SOWN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh.
responses.french: A balança fica na seção de ervas.

phrases.cultural_note: Prescriptions are handled at the wooden apothecary counter, which serves as the main service point.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, entregue no balcão principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayngt-REH-gih NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, hand it in at the main counter.

responses.english: Good morning, hand it in at the main counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayngt-REH-gih NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, entregue no balcão principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar a minha receita médica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo day-SHAHR AH MEE-nyuh reh-SAY-tuh MEH-dee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Drop-off procedures prioritize the central wooden counter to maintain workflow efficiency.

likely_response.local: Entregue no balcão da farmácia, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: ayngt-REH-gih NOO bahl-KOWN DUH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh, POOR fuh-VOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Drop it off at the pharmacy counter, please.

responses.english: Drop it off at the pharmacy counter, please.
responses.phonetic: ayngt-REH-gih NOO bahl-KOWN DUH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh, POOR fuh-VOHR.
responses.french: Entregue no balcão da farmácia, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the apothecary counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão da farmácia, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DUH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh, POOR fuh-VOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The pharmacy retains a historic wooden apothecary counter, a nod to its traditional role.

likely_response.local: O balcão da farmácia fica na área central, onde está o farmacêutico.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DUH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh FEE-kuh NUH AH-reeuh sayngt-RAHL, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: The pharmacy counter is in the central area, where the pharmacist is.

responses.english: The pharmacy counter is in the central area, where the pharmacist is.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DUH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh FEE-kuh NUH AH-reeuh sayngt-RAHL, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo.
responses.french: O balcão da farmácia fica na área central, onde está o farmacêutico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to weigh herbal teas
phrases.text_local: Onde posso pesar os chás de ervas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-ZAHR OOSH SHAHSH DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Weighing herbal teas remains a traditional pharmacy service in Portugal, preserving historic apothecary methods.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the pharmacist at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the pharmacist at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the prescription service window is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a janela de atendimento de receitas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH zhuh-NEH-luh DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DIH reh-SAY-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic Portuguese pharmacies separate prescription services from retail to comply with health regulations.

likely_response.local: O farmacêutico pode indicar-lhe o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: The pharmacist can tell you the exact location.

responses.english: The pharmacist can tell you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: AW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.french: O farmacêutico pode indicar-lhe o local exato.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso entregar a receita médica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayngt-rih-GAHR AH reh-SAY-tuh MEH-dee-kuh?

phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a janela para as receitas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH zhuh-NEH-luh PUH-ruh UHSH reh-SAY-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Prescription windows in historic venues are often positioned away from retail displays for regulatory compliance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o balcão situa-se ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW bahl-KOWN see-TOOUH-SIH OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the counter is located at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, the counter is located at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW bahl-KOWN see-TOOUH-SIH OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.french: Bom dia, o balcão situa-se ao fundo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where herbal tea is weighed
phrases.text_local: Onde pesam o chá de ervas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PEH-zuhng AW SHAH DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The pharmacy has a dedicated herbal remedy display where teas are weighed and prepared.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é no balcão das ervas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH NOO bahl-KOWN DUHSH EH-ruh-vuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the herbal counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the herbal counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH NOO bahl-KOWN DUHSH EH-ruh-vuhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, é no balcão das ervas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get souvenir receipt
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o recibo das lembranças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW reh-SEE-boo DUHSH laymb-RAHNNG-suhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Souvenir receipts are handled separately to distinguish tax-free purchases from standard pharmacy goods.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso provar a ginjinha aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo proo-VAHR AH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Ao lado do balcão de receitas, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-SAY-tuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can taste the ginjinha at the ginjinha tasting station, near the prescription counter.

responses.english: You can taste the ginjinha at the ginjinha tasting station, near the prescription counter.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-SAY-tuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao lado do balcão de receitas, à direita.
